workflow.rule: ITERATIVE DEVELOPMENT ONLY: Complete exactly ONE task at a time.
STOP AFTER EACH TASK: After finishing a task, you MUST stop and ask: "Tech Lead, please review. Should I make any changes, or proceed to the next task?"
PROCEED ONLY WHEN APPROVED: Only continue when the Tech Lead explicitly says: "Approved. Proceed to Task X"
Do NOT run prisma init automatically. Assume Prisma is already configured.

output_control.rule: DO NOT generate the entire project at once
DO NOT generate code for multiple tasks in one response
DO NOT add extra features not requested

code_quality.rule: Use descriptive variable and function names
No duplicated code blocks longer than 20 lines

architecture.pattern: Layered Architecture: Routes → Controllers → Services → Repositories

rules.controller: - Handle request and response only - No business logic

scalability.rule: Write code with extensibility in mind
Design APIs that can support future Elasticsearch integration
